reviews.review_description: None of it is one English so it just takes away from the experience. Is it German?

The app is a 3D 360 animation of a bee hive. It's really rather wonderful to watch and admire. As per the app details, German is the only supported language, but you just look at points to trigger animations and move onto the next section. Only a short experience, but wonderful. I'll show this to friends and family.
This is a nice VR Bee environment but is in German with no English option…very well done though..a bit like Ocean Rift in a Bee Hive…
